goal: Bring back the EN/TH toggle on every page + fix TH not persisting across navigation (B2-1)
root_cause: getUrlLanguage() returned 'en' for ANY non-/th/ page (truthy), so initShell's `normalizeLang(urlLang) || savedLang` always took the path-default 'en' and clobbered the saved TH preference on every navigation. Also the EN/TH toggle only rendered on Profile (Phase-5 removed the global navbar that hosted it).
fix: initShell locale priority rewritten: explicit ?lang/?l param > /th/ path > saved preference > en (saved now beats path-default). Injected a global EN|TH pill (.mt-lang-fab, fixed bottom-left mirroring the Report FAB, light-theme) on every page except profile, wired to the page's onLangToggle or a built-in in-place switcher (persists + applyTranslations + applyLocaleMeta).
verified: harness: toggle TH on home → saved=th, html lang=th; navigate to decks.html (no lang param) → still TH (eyebrow 'สำรับ', TH active) — persistence confirmed. Moved pill bottom-left after it overlapped the daily top-bar streak chip top-right. node --check passes; md5 parity canonical=www=ios.
